title: taraxacum laciniosum
intro: Taraxacum laciniosum, also known as the woolly dandelion, is a perennial plant species in the sunflower family, characterized by its hairy leaves and stems. It has been traditionally used in medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to its alkaloids and flavonoids content. The health benefits of Taraxacum laciniosum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
